# Test apx search command
#
# This scenario verifies the search command can discover APIs in the catalog
# including identity-aware fields (domain, api_line, lifecycle)

# Setup: Create a test canonical repo with catalog
mkdir canonical
cd canonical
exec git init
exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=apis --skip-git --non-interactive

# Overwrite catalog/catalog.yaml with identity-enriched test data
exec sh -c 'echo "version: 1" > catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "org: testorg" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "repo: apis" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "modules:" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: payments" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Payment ledger API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.2.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_stable: v1.2.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/payments/wallet/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/payments/wallet/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: payments" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Digital wallet API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: beta" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: proto/payments/wallet/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: openapi/customer/accounts/v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: openapi/customer/accounts/v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: openapi" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: customer" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Customer accounts API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v2.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_stable: v2.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_prerelease: v2.1.0-beta.1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: openapi/customer/accounts/v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'

# Search all APIs (uses default catalog/catalog.yaml)
exec apx search
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'wallet'
stdout 'accounts'

# Search by name
exec apx search ledger
stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'accounts'

# Search by format
exec apx search --format=proto
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'accounts'

# Search by lifecycle
exec apx search --lifecycle=stable
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'accounts'
! stdout 'wallet'

exec apx search --lifecycle=beta
stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'accounts'

# Search by domain
exec apx search --domain=payments
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'accounts'

exec apx search --domain=customer
stdout 'accounts'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'

# Search by api-line
exec apx search --api-line=v2
stdout 'accounts'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'

# Combined filters
exec apx search --format=proto --domain=payments --lifecycle=stable
stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'accounts'

# Search with no matches
exec apx search nonexistent
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'accounts'
